title: KonpeitoCraft
description: TBD >:D WE'RE WORKING ON IT WE'RE WORKING ON IT WE'RE WORKING ON IT WE'RE WORKING ON IT BE PATIENT BE PATIENT REBRAND INCOMING
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cmBVKQeZ/images/ebdcbcbfebb61e165823ee1c66cade58b8d7018f.png "KonpeitoCraft Logo")

**KonpeitoCraft** (originally *Vanilla: But Beautiful!*) is a cozy, chaotic, kitchen-sink modpack hand-curated by **remedywashere** and a handful of their favorite people.
What started as a personal world to unwind in slowly turned into a project worth sharing far beyond its original circle. The goal was simple: make something bright, comforting, and exciting that anyone could enjoy, regardless of how powerful their computer was.

Development began in **February 2024**, first taking shape as a gentle vanilla-plus experience. That didn’t last long. Ideas piled up, inspiration snowballed, and before anyone could blink, KonpeitoCraft had grown into a colorful mix of adventures, creatures, stories, and little surprises tucked into nearly every corner. It became less of a modpack and more of a place.

Set sail across wide, lively oceans and discover new sea creatures you’ve never met before with **Hybrid Aquatic**!
Wander through villages where the people feel more real, more curious, and more eager to talk back with **MCA: Reborn**, alongside the cozy, character-filled structures added by **Dungeons and Taverns**!
Dig deep into the earth to uncover fossils and forgotten history with **Fossils and Archeology: Revival**!
Experiment with the whirring, clattering, endlessly creative machinery of the **Create** mod.
Explore refreshed worldgen where familiar structures have been thoughtfully reimagined — **Integrated Strongholds** and **Integrated Villages** add depth, character, and a sense of discovery to places you thought you already knew.

KonpeitoCraft is built to be welcoming. Whether you’re here for long adventures, creative building, casual wandering, or just the feeling of being somewhere warm and familiar, it has space for you.

> ![Konpeito](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f530db249feaa899bc780888f8b6b8d1479755e5.png)
> *"To my dear friends, love you to the stars and back. Have fun and think of me every time you play." - remedywashere*
